name: Chicken with Spanish Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 cup canned tomatoes, whole, with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat, warm the oil.
2. Sprinkle both sides of the chicken with the paprika.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until golden on both sides, 7-8 minutes. Remove the chicken to a dish and cover loosely to keep warm.
4. Add the rice and scallions to the skillet. Cook, stirring frequently, until the rice is golden and translucent, 2-3 minutes.
5. Stir in the broth, tomatoes with liquid, parsley, saffron, and pepper (crushing the tomatoes with a spoon). Bring the liquid to a boil.
6. Return the chicken and any juices that may have accumulated to the skillet. Cover.
7. Reduce heat to low and simmer for fifteen minutes, stirring occasionally.
8. Stir in the green beans and pimiento. Cover and cook until just tender, about 15 minutes.
